transcript.text:
[5 Large orders of Bossam?]
[Bossam (Boiled Pork)]
[This video was made with financial support from KB Card to introduce their brand]
Time for 2nd round
[Naengmyun (Cold Noodles)]
Finished
Now for the dessert
[Sandwich for dessert...]
[Just Tzuyang doing Tzuyang things...]
Hello everyone
I got together with KB Card today for small business owners
to use KB Pay to order delivery
There are a lot of benefits and it's easy to use
I will show you that feature and eat some food
I'll go change into the shirt they gave me
Ta-da

I can act like a KB Card employee now
I will use KB Pay by using the delivery app
[Bossam first]
This bossam restaurant is in Nakwon-dong and it has been there for over 30 years!
But I've been told that they are struggling because of the pandemic
[Janggun Jokbal Bossam] [Seoul, Jongro-gu]
[Traditional-style Menu]
We waited thinking that it will be over soon And 2 years passed by...
More than half of our regulars are not coming anymore
Some days we had 1 table the whole day
It's been very hard
But I hope everything works out well for everyone now
How about 5 Large orders of bossam?
Possible?
I'll share it with the workers here
[Large size]

[5 of them!]
I will order them as a whole
[You can choose how you want it served]
Click KB Pay
Connect through app for easy transactions
I will use this card
It's called TokTokD Card
It can give up to 50% discount if you use this
And because I'm using the KB Pay app, I can get 10% discount for online orders
So a total of 60%
I use delivery apps a lot
And it's very convenient
Do I need to switch over?
[Bossam that's been boiled for a long time]
[Mouth-watering red bossam kimchi]
[It's on its way]

Bossam is here
Kimchi and bossam both look so good
Looks about 2~3kgs
Bon appetit
Whole-bossam, it's been a while I used to eat this all the time
Which one first?
They're all the same
Smaller one first
It's been a while
Some kimchi sauce
Did you see how that just bit off?
Amazing
It's really tender and seasoned well
And also, another thing
The TokTokD Card that I used earlier can be used not only on Baemin,
But also other delivery apps like Yogiyo, Coupangeats, and Market Kurly

Discounts on even market apps like Market Kurly
So you can cook for yourself
[Salted shrimp]
It's really good The meat is very tender
With kimchi too
Looks good!
Wrap the top part like this
The texture is different for all the parts
Raw garlic
1 bite
[Nom Nom]
[Spiced radish]
Kimchi is good and so is the radish
[1 piece cleared]
Another one
The juiciness

Can you see it?
[No, but we can hear it...]
I personally don't eat the salted shrimp that much with bossam
Ssamjang is the best (seasoned soybean paste)
This is the best with meat
I've done a whole-bossam mukbang before back when I barely started streaming
[Long time ago...]
That video really got my name out there
This brings back memories
But I will have to cut them into slices
[All good to go]
So soft and tender
[Can't forget about the bossam wrap]
The meat is just so tender
I've heard so many times that restaurants have been through tough times because of covid
Even the restaurants that are located near KB Card Headquarters

That's why we picked those restaurants for today's mukbang
It's not too big of a help, but
we hope the best for everyone to overcome the hard times
Sliced kimchi here
There's radish inside
This is how it's eaten
[Eating without saying anything again]
It has chewy parts
And very soft
Not greasy
Wrap it with kimchi
Another good thing about using KB Pay is that
It has Smart Order
A lot of people call to make pick-up orders
I've never seen this before, but
There's a rest-area smart order

You can use this feature to order in advance before you get to the rest-area
I do a lot of long drives for work and I think it'll be very convenient to use this feature to quickly pick up and eat
A lot of people are going on long drives for the holidays, so this feature will definitely be useful for those trips
[2 scoops of ssamjang for 2 pieces of bossam]
Kimchi is tasty too
[What happened to all the bossam?]
[2 slices per wrap...]
This is a chunk of fat
I love it
I love eating the fat part
It's time for a 2nd round
I will use Yogiyo app to deliver this time
Have you heard of Yogi Pass? I use this too
It's 9,900 Won per month and it gives 30,000 Won in discount coupons
And you can get a rebate for the membership cost if you use the Yogi Pass Credit Card
And I recently registered

[What next?]
This place called "Gilseon's" has naengmyun
[This place that opened after covid started]
[Gilseon's] [Seoul, Jongro-gu]
Most of the companies stopped letting their employees go out for lunch because of the pandemic
And lost customers because of social distancing
We barely held on because of the delivery orders
We hope to serve many customers with this new feature
[Then let's start ordering!]
No cucumbers please!
[Yogi Pass 5,000 Won discounts]
That's a lot of discounts
I will pay using the KB Card TokTokD Card
[Click on KBPay App Card from the transaction page]
[Easy to process with fingerprrint scan]
[Let's fire it up!]

[Stir-fried smokey goodness]
[Icey cold naengmyun noodles] [A must-have dish for the Summer]
Thank you
It's here
It's naengmyun
I've been wanting this because it's summer
Looks good
It will taste good with the charcoal grilled ribs
This is going to be great
Naengmyun for the summer days
[So cold]
[Healthy teeth?]
The broth is very flavorful
That's good
Let's try it with the meat
The smokey flavors

Spicy one too
This is just what I like
Savory and sweet
They were selling a lot of other dishes like stews too
They must be good too
Meat straight into the noodles
[inaudible]
[Help me!]
What? When did you fall?
Good call
[Much love for our sponsors]
The bossam and naengmyun today were fantastic
Those of you who work near Gwanghwamun or near Euljiro,
or even people who are visiting the area
should give these restaurants a visit
It will be a huge help to them

The spicy naengmyun should be eaten with meat
[2nd Tzu-fuel]
It's cute, right?
This isn't all
I will have a 3rd round
[Having a feast by herself...]
My teeth are cold
Finished
I will have some dessert for 3rd round
The workers here have been here for a bit
So I will order multiple
Sandwiches will be great
This shop is located near Gwanghwamun
Looks delicious
[A place inside this underground plaza]
[With Sand] [Seoul, Jongro-gu]

She's my mother-in-law
Covid happened shortly after we opened our business
The regulars came to see us even more after covid to support us
It was all thanks to them
Looks good I will order all of the popular items
Ham cheese, chicken tender,
Chili chicken,
I will order this time using a different card
This is called the KB TokTok With Card
It gives a 5% discount off the delivery fee
Including the 10% online discount
So 15% off
[Select the KB TokTok With Card from KB Pay]
It's nice because it gives you a discount on the delivery fee
And also you can get a 50% off rebate from Starbucks
And plus the 10% online discount

So that's 60% off
Get discounts for food and also your drinks
The fact that Tzuyang is eating our sandwiches...
So grateful
This feels like a dream
Ta-da
So many ta-da's today
This isn't all for me, but I would like to show them
Teriyaki chicken?
Looks good They're very big in size
Really big
KB Card workers are here
And they've been waiting here for a while
I will share these
[Enjoy!]
So good

Amazing
[Let's eat]
Sauce is good and so is the bread
I don't usually like sandwiches, but these are so good!
I don't like veggies, but why are sandwiches so good?
You didn't spill anything today
This?
Just a little, but not on this side
It's fine
[Proud of myself]
[Done with 3rd round]
I used KB Card today to order delivery from small businesses for today's mukbang to show support
I like how easy it was to use KB Pay
There are also a lot of incentives to use this card offline
And it can be used across the country
You should try it out if you are interested in all the benefits

Thanks everyone
I ate everything! KB Pay!
[This video was made with financial support from KB Card to introduce their brand] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
